pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates the directory and task_utils.sh references it.
setup_task.sh intentionally injects these three bugs in lsb.py, and export_result.sh specifically checks for fixes for them.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a fully synthetic steganography tool (stego_toolkit) located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/stego_toolkit. The tool has three explicit bugs intentionally introduced in lsb.py: 1) destructive_masking (a bitwise AND with 0x00 instead of 0xFE), 2) wrong_base_conversion (interpreting binary string as base 10 instead of base 2 during decode), and 3) missing_terminator (the decoder does not stop when reading '00000000'). To pass, an agent must fix enough of these to score at least 60 points based on the test suite.
